case_title: STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPT. vs. FERGUSON, JOHN A

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FERGUSON, JOHN A $7,546.79 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,546.79, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION

PROOF OF SERVICE ON APPLICATION AND NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT SERVED DEC-20-2010, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT FERGUSON, JOHN A PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION. WRIT MAY ISSUE ON JAN-25-2011 IF NO MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT
